headline: INEOSGrenadiersand WTWAnnounce Partnership
summary: LONDON, April 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The INEOS Grenadiers Cycling Team today announced a multi-year global partnership with WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company. headline: INEOS Grenadiers And WTW Forge Multi-Year Global Insurance Partnership To Navigate Risk And Performance
